programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Mystery Box Risotto
programme.desc: One contestant from each of the Top Five duos faces a solo risotto challenge without their partner.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Mystery Box Dessert
programme.desc: The second contestant from each of the Top Five duos faces a solo dessert challenge without their partner.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Risotto & Dessert
programme.desc: MasterChef judges Simon Gault and Ray McVinnie make their favourite risotto and dessert.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Bali / Club Med
programme.desc: The Top Four duos tackle an Asian cuisine challenge at Club Med in Bali.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Bali / Bumbu Bali
programme.desc: The Top Four duos cook Indonesian cuisine at Bumbu Bali Cooking School.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - MasterClass S04 #08 Josh & Simon / Bali
programme.desc: MasterChef judges Josh Emett and Simon Gault cook with local ingredients in Bali.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Cookbook
programme.desc: The Top Three duos create two dishes they’d like to include in their first cookbooks.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Restaurant
programme.desc: The Top Three duos create two dishes they’d like to serve in their own restaurants.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - MasterClass S04 #09 Simon & Ray / Cookbook dishes
programme.desc: MasterChef judges Simon Gault and Ray McVinnie cook dishes from their cookbooks.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Peter Gordon
programme.desc: The Top Three duos replicate a paddle crab linguine dish by world-renowned Kiwi chef Peter Gordon.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Michel Louws
programme.desc: The Top Three duos make two intricate beef dishes by Michelin star-winning chef Michel Louws.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Simon & Ray / Favourites
programme.desc: MasterChef judges Simon Gault and Ray McVinnie cook two of their favourite dishes

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Grand Final
programme.desc: The Top Two duos face three epic challenges to decide who will win the MasterChef New Zealand title.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP1
programme.desc: Fifty talented home cooks from around the country compete for just 24 MasterChef aprons.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP2
programme.desc: At the MasterChef kitchen, the Top 24 contestants face a mystery box challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP3
programme.desc: The Top 16 contestants move into the MasterChef house then face a fish challenge in the MasterChef kitchen.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP4
programme.desc: The Top 15 contestants must replicate a gourmet egg dish created by award-winning Auckland chef Simon Wright.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP5
programme.desc: The Top 14 contestants face a mystery box challenge in which they must cook one savoury and one sweet dish.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP6
programme.desc: The contestants must reinvent one of three classic dishes – macaroni cheese, roast lamb or trifle.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP7
programme.desc: The contestants face their first team challenge and first full service

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP8
programme.desc: The contestants tackle a ‘heads and tails’ challenge in which they must cook lesser-known cuts of meat.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP9
programme.desc: The Top 10 contestants cook one savoury dish and one sweet dish for the MasterChef judges.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP10
programme.desc: The Top Nine contestants cook with their ‘weapons of choice’ – a cream canister, smoking gun or blow torch.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP11
programme.desc: The The Top Eight contestants cook a three course dinner for 80 guests.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP12
programme.desc: The contestants must each cook a dish using My Food Bag ingredients.

programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP9
programme.desc: Nine $1 million cases are on the line for a New Jersey woman's game.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP10
programme.desc: A hot-dog merchant from Nevada and a teacher from Pennsylvania compete for the top prize.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP11
programme.desc: A teacher from Pennsylvania returns to finish her game.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP12
programme.desc: The game gets hairy for a barber from Ohio, who plays for $2 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Thanksgiving Special - Part 1
programme.desc: A restaurateur competes in a tasty Thanksgiving-themed game worth $2 million. In addition, the case models participate in various eating contests.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Thanksgiving Special - Part 2
programme.desc: A restaurateur competes in a tasty Thanksgiving-themed game worth $2 million. In addition, the case models participate in various eating contests.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP14
programme.desc: A single mother from the Bronx and a woman from Florida vie for the top prize.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP15
programme.desc: A woman from Florida continues her quest to score the big prize. Then a Minnesota math teacher hopes it will all add up for a million-dollar win.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP16
programme.desc: A Minnesota teacher tries to chalk up a win. Then a part-time bartender from Massachusetts plays, hoping to tap into some cash to open a bar.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP19
programme.desc: A female drag racer from California revs up to play for the $1 million prize, as does a vivacious farmer-grandmother from Iowa.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA Season 01 (Syndicated Version) - EP39
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA Season 01 (Syndicated Version) - EP32
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP10
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP11
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP17
programme.desc: Tis the season for a potential million-dollar Christmas. In holiday-themed games, a family from California steps up to play, as does a newly married war hero from Oregon.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP18
programme.desc: A coach from Tennessee tries to score $1 million. Then, a makeup artist from Texas pursues the top prize.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP21
programme.desc: A New Jersey workingman plays for big bucks.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP22
programme.desc: 4 contestants, from Ohio, Connecticut and 2 from California - battle it out in a special speed game.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP2
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP3
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP12
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP13
programme.desc: There’s a big travel prize up for grabs as the Top Six contestants cook dishes featuring New Zealand clams.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP14
programme.desc: The Top Five contestants must replicate a complicated dessert.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP15
programme.desc: At Al Maha resort in the Arabian desert, the Top Four contestants pair off to cook a seven-course feast.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP16
programme.desc: At Grosvenor House in Dubai, the contestants cook a three-course meal for 24 guests.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP17
programme.desc: In the semi-final, the top three contestants cook their signature dishes for the judges.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP18
programme.desc: The two finalists face three epic challenges to decide who will win the MasterChef New Zealand title.

programme.title: Immunity Challenge: Dan Hong
programme.desc: Ben battles against celebrity chef Dan Hong in the first immunity pin challenge of the season.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Auditions
programme.desc: Hundreds of hopeful contestants compete for a place in the Top 50.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - EP402
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia Season 04

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - EP402
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia Season 04

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Top 50: Mornington Peninsula Challenge
programme.desc: The top 12 performers from the Mystery Box challenge travel to the Mornington Peninsula.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Top 50: Salmon Challenge
programme.desc: The remaining contestants are given the choice to compete for one of five spots in the Top 24.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Top 50: Pressure Test
programme.desc: In their first Pressure Test, Shannon Bennett brings a twist on the classic Peach Melba.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Masterclass 1
programme.desc: The top 18 contestants travel to Daylesford Lake House for their first MasterClass with Alla Wolf-Tasker.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Top 50: Elimination Challenge - French Cuisine
programme.desc: The remaining twelve hopefuls faced a French Invention Test set by Jacques Reymond at Montsalvat.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Top 24: Mystery Box
programme.desc: The Top 24 contestants enter the MasterChef Australia kitchen for their first mystery box challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Offsite Challenge: King's Cross
programme.desc: In their first Team Challenge, contestants took over the running of two of King's Cross best restaurants.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Elimination Challenge: Pasta
programme.desc: In a three-round pasta-themed challenge, the Red Team fight for their places in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Masterclass 2
programme.desc: Gary and George demonstrate some seafood recipes for the contestants.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - EP13
programme.desc: In the Mystery Box challenge, contestants are faced with a range of ingredients that have to be "cracked".

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Pressure Test: Peter Gilmore
programme.desc: Star chef Peter Gilmore sets the bottom three contestants a Pressure Test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Immunity Challenge: 3 Blue Ducks
programme.desc: Mindy faces professional chef Darren Robertson in an immunity pin challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Offsite Challenge: Yum Cha
programme.desc: The top 22 contestants head to Sydney's Chinese Gardens to compete in a yum cha challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Elimination Challenge: Tagine
programme.desc: The losing team must identify the 25 ingredients in a North African tagine.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Masterclass 3
programme.desc: Gary and Matt Moran host a MasterClass where they explore raw foods, herbs, and oils.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Mystery Box: Biscuits & Invention Test: Mexican
programme.desc: In a Mexican-themed Invention Test Julia chooses a cactus and a prickly pear as the core ingredient.

programme.title: Fear Factor USA - EP17
programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Fear Factor USA - EP22
programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - The Bees Are So Angry
programme.desc: Five teams of two compete for $100,000 dollars on a five stunt, 2 hour spectacular.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Leeches & Shaved Heads & Tear Gas
programme.desc: In a special 2 hour Fear Factor five teams of 2 are bungeed off a cliff while tied under a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Snake Bite
programme.desc: Four couples compete for a grand prize of $50,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Roach Coach
programme.desc: Four teams of two compete for $50,000 as they are locked in a cage and sunk underwater.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Broken Hearts & Blood Baths
programme.desc: Four teams of exes must deal with 3 stunts and each other.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Tall Crappacino
programme.desc: Four teams of two attempt to win $50,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Hee Haw! Hee Haw!
programme.desc: Four sets of twins compete for $50,000 as they are electric shocked.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Scorpion Tales
programme.desc: Four teams of family members compete for $50,000 as they careen into a quarry full of live ammunition.
